Video.summary: Guest star Lucille Ball joins Carol for a glittering showbiz sketch, "The Rock Sisters!"
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Lucille Ball, George Carlin

Video.summary: Rock Hudson plays a man on the prowl for the ladies in a bar. Also, Tim is a television announcer.
Video.title: Rock Hudson

Video.summary: Ruth Buzzi and Richard Crenna take part in a salute to the "bad girls" of cinema.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Ruth Buzzi, Richard Crenna

Video.summary: Guest stars Bernadette Peters, Nancy Wilson, and The Burgundy Street Singers.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Bernadette Peters

Video.summary: Dick Van Dyke is Carol's guest, lending his impressive talents to an homage to Shirley Temple films.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Dick Van Dyke

Video.summary: Vincent Price stars in a salute to horror. George imagines he is gambler, & a pregnant pause on "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Vincent Price

Video.summary: Guest Shirley MacLaine joins Carol in sharing some of their fan mail.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Shirley MacLaine

Video.summary: Carol welcomes Vincent Price and Joan Rivers!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Joan Rivers, Vincent Price

Video.summary: Carol's guests tonight are Garry Moore and Durward Kirby.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Garry Moore, Durward Kirby

Video.summary: Nanette Fabray stars as Carol's rival. Also, a "V.I.P." interview and a satiric look at foreign airlines.
Video.title: Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, and David Frost join Carol for an Italian-style production of Cinderella.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost

Image.alt: Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost

Video.summary: Tonights guests are Tim Conway and Eydie Gorme!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway, Eydie Gorme

Video.summary: Broadway legend Gwen Verdon and Pat Boone join for an installment of "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Gwen Verdon, Pat Boone

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence and Carol Channing join Carol, Harvey, Vicki, and Lyle for a tribute to the Academy Awards.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Carol Channing, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Tonight's guests: Nanette Fabray and Trini Lopez!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Trini Lopez, Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Dick Van Dyke & Tony Randall star! Includes Dick as a salesman, and Carol & Tony as marrieds.
Video.title: Dick Van Dyke, Tony Randall

Video.summary: Nanette Fabray and Mel Torme lend their star power to a show-biz spectacle: the movie spoof, "43rd Street."
Video.title: Mel Torme, Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Mr. Tudball takes his secretary Mrs. Wiggins out for lunch.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Carol's old friends Garry Moore and Durward Kirby visit for the holidays.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Garry Moore, Durward Kirby

Video.summary: Guest Martha Raye drags Carol to The Tomcat Club. Also featured: "Carol & Sis" and "The Old Folks."
Video.title: Martha Raye

Video.summary: Tim Conway plays The Oldest Galley Slave, an ad exec visiting an actress, and a lawyer who is a rabbit.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Helen Reddy & John Byner appear in parodies. John is in a "Nora Desmond" sketch, and Vicki plays columnist.
Video.title: Helen Reddy, John Byner

Video.summary: The third season finale "Family Show" features the cast of regulars at their very best.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Ms. Betty White stars! Betty plays Eunice's sister as "The Family" celebrates. Also, Carol & Tim lose sleep.
Video.title: Betty White

Video.summary: Guest Soupy Sales and Carol are shoppers. "The Old Folks" get a visit & Carol quits smoking in "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Soupy Sales

Video.summary: Features Harvey & Carol encounter a wishing well, and another installment of "The Family."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Paul Lynde and Peggy Lee are tonight's guests! Featuring an improv comedy performance.
Video.title: Paul Lynde, Peggy Lee

Video.summary: Jim Nabors guests. Features Harvey's Emmy Award speech, and a presentation of "Hollywood Canteen."
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Joel Grey & Vincent Price guest. They play guests at a hotel where Carol is the operator. Also "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Joel Grey, Vincent Price

Video.summary: Features a take-off of the classic film "National Velvet", and a sketch with Carol & Harvey as a couple.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Invisible dogs run amok in an obedience class, while insurance agent Carol pesters doctor Tim.
Video.title: Family Show
